name: Apparatus Velocity Deck
pitch: Scroll-pinned image deck that physically stretches, skews, and splits into offset slices in response to scroll velocity.

lifecycle.idle: Cards breathe with subtle Y/Z oscillation and micro-rotation drift
lifecycle.discovery: Initial reveal with staggered fade-in from depth
lifecycle.buildUp: Velocity skew engages, card spacing widens with scroll momentum
lifecycle.peak: Cards exit with choreographed unique trajectories
lifecycle.recovery: Velocity skew springs back to neutral, breathing resumes
